title: Inside Edge: Reporting with Confidence - Annual Disclosure Insights for 2026
content:
## Inside Edge: Reporting with Confidence - Annual Disclosure Insights for 2026
Join us for the next session in McCarthy Tétrault's Inside Edge Series - a practical discussion on disclosure and regulatory developments shaping Canada's public company landscape in 2026.
Our panel will share insights on the evolving disclosure environment and provide practical insights to help in-house teams prepare for the upcoming continuous disclosure season and stay ahead of new requirements, investor expectations, and governance trends.
Topics will include:
- Emerging governance and voting trends - including key updates from ISS, Glass Lewis, Board Games and CCGG; shifts in institutional voting behavior and notable activism themes.
- Continuous disclosure and regulatory reform - including CSA modernization initiatives and non-GAAP disclosure updates.
- Evolving ESG and risk-disclosure expectations - Including the CSA's climate-disclosure pause, increasing scrutiny on AI and other non-financial risks and growing influence from U.S. policy changes.
Designed for Calgary's in-house legal and corporate teams, the session will highlight the most impactful regulatory updates and practical implications for your board and disclosure practices.
For questions about this event, please contact calgaryevents@mccarthy.ca .
